name: alchornea castaneifolia
mechanism: Contains alkaloids like alchorneine and other secondary metabolites; bark extracts inhibit prostaglandin synthesis and reduce inflammation; used for pain relief and anti‑inflammatory effects【335246768052841†L115-L126】.
